models.name: Z-Image-Turbo
models.description: Lightning-fast image generation with optimized performance

code_examples.text_to_image:
curl -X POST https://api.visuluxe.com/v1/images/generations \
-H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-d '{
"model": "z-image-turbo",
"prompt": "A beautiful sunset over mountains",
"n": 1,
"size": "1024x1024",
"response_format": "url"
}'

models.name: Flux Dev
models.description: Advanced model with high-quality image generation

code_examples.text_to_image:
curl -X POST https://api.visuluxe.com/v1/images/generations \
-H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-d '{
"model": "flux-dev",
"prompt": "A futuristic cityscape at night",
"n": 4,
"size": "1024x1024",
"response_format": "url"
}'
code_examples.image_to_image:
curl -X POST https://api.visuluxe.com/v1/images/generations \
-H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
-H "Content-Type: application/json" \
-d '{
"model": "flux-dev",
"prompt": "Transform this into a cyberpunk style",
"image": "base64_encoded_image",
"strength": 0.8,
"size": "1024x1024",
"response_format": "url"
}'
